queryList.41: hp_slave: SELECT s.*, e.shop_evaluation_num, e.praise_average, a.add_city as city, a.add_longitude, a.add_latitude, t.discount_rate, t.discount_on, t.book_day, t.start_time, t.end_time, t.reserved_time_min, t.discount_limit, t.platform_bear_percent, t.shop_bear_percent, t.id AS shop_take_self_config_id, i.preorder_push_shop, i.use_plastic, plastic_amount, i.platform_fee_up_limit, i.platform_fee_low_limit, i.user_pack_platform_fee, i.user_pack_platform_fee_rate, i.user_pack_platform_fee_type, i.user_pack_platform_fee_up_limit, i.user_pack_platform_fee_low_limit, i.is_virtual_shop, i.real_shop_id, sle.is_supported, GROUP_CONCAT(mn.operation_value ORDER BY mn.sort SEPARATOR "·") shopFullName, ssm.preorder_closed_support, i.im_switch, i.im_shop_index_switch, i.im_order_not_received_switch, i.im_order_received_switch, i.im_order_not_delivered_switch, i.preorder_open_type, s.shop_order_stop_status, s.shop_order_stop_keep_time, s.shop_order_stop_start_time, s.new_order_prepare_extend_time, i.im_order_delivered_switch, s.delivery_type FROM shop s LEFT JOIN evaluation e ON s.shop_id = e.shop_id LEFT JOIN address a ON a.add_id = s.address_id LEFT JOIN hp_shop_take_self_config t ON s.shop_id = t.shop_id AND t.language_code = 'CN' LEFT JOIN hp_merchant_operation_name mn on s.shop_id = mn.shop_id and mn.is_del = 0 and mn.lang = 'CN' LEFT JOIN shop_extra_info i ON i.shop_id = s.shop_id LEFT JOIN shop_lang_extra sle ON sle.shop_id = s.shop_id LEFT JOIN hp_shop_search_middle ssm ON ssm.shop_id = s.shop_id AND sle.is_del = 0 AND sle.lang = 'CN' WHERE s.shop_id in ( 59750820 ) AND s.is_del = 0 AND s.audit_status = 1 AND e.is_del = 0 group by s.shop_id
queryList.42: hp_slave: select shop_id, fence_latlng from hp_shop_delivery_fence where shop_id in ( 59750820 ) and delivery_type = 1

queryList.45: hp_slave: select rec_id ,activity_sn ,config_key ,config_value ,create_time ,updata_time ,is_del from hp_invite_common_material_config where is_del = 0 and activity_sn = '40o44AB4rsJ'
queryList.46: hp_slave: select hssp.shop_id as shopId, hssp.product_id as productId, pdm.spell_score as globalScore, pdm.sales_num_score as salesNumScore, pdm.low_price_score as lowPriceScore, hps.num as productSaleNum, hssp.business_type from hp_spell_shop_product hssp left join product p on hssp.product_id=p.product_id left join product_sales_location psl on psl.product_id = hssp.product_id left join product_sku ps on hssp.product_sku_id=ps.product_sku_id left join hp_data_product_data pdm on hssp.product_id=pdm.product_id left join hp_product_sales hps on hssp.product_id = hps.product_id WHERE hssp.is_del=0 and psl.is_del = 0 and psl.is_supported =1 and p.is_del=0 and ps.is_del=0 and (hssp.stock-hssp.quantity_sold>0 or hssp.stock=0) and ps.`status`=1 and p.product_status=0 and psl.sales_location = 1 and hssp.type = 1 and hssp.shop_id in ( 59750820 ) and hssp.city='九江市' GROUP BY hssp.product_id ORDER BY pdm.spell_score DESC, hps.num DESC ,hssp.id desc LIMIT 0,300
queryList.47: hp_slave: SELECT p.product_id, p.shop_id, p.menu_id, p.product_img, p.pro_num, p.product_price, p.product_name, p.product_status, p.is_combine, p.buy_limit_min, hdpsn.sale_num_last_30_day as product_sale_num from product p left join hp_data_product_sale_num as hdpsn on p.product_id = hdpsn.product_id WHERE p.is_del = 0 AND p.product_id in ( 81668876 )

queryList.55: hp_slave: SELECT hssp.* FROM hp_spell_shop_product hssp left join product p on hssp.product_id=p.product_id left join product_sku ps on hssp.product_sku_id=ps.product_sku_id left join product_sales_location psl on psl.product_id = hssp.product_id WHERE hssp.is_del=0 and psl.is_del = 0 and p.is_del=0 and ps.is_del=0 and (hssp.stock-hssp.quantity_sold>0 or hssp.stock=0) and ps.`status`=1 and p.product_status=0 and hssp.type = 1 and psl.sales_location = 1 and psl.is_supported =1 and hssp.product_id in ( 81668876 )

queryList.57: hp_slave: SELECT s.*, e.shop_evaluation_num, e.praise_average, a.add_city as city, a.add_longitude, a.add_latitude, t.discount_rate, t.discount_on, t.book_day, t.start_time, t.end_time, t.reserved_time_min, t.discount_limit, t.platform_bear_percent, t.shop_bear_percent, t.id AS shop_take_self_config_id, i.preorder_push_shop, i.use_plastic, plastic_amount, i.platform_fee_up_limit, i.platform_fee_low_limit, i.user_pack_platform_fee, i.user_pack_platform_fee_rate, i.user_pack_platform_fee_type, i.user_pack_platform_fee_up_limit, i.user_pack_platform_fee_low_limit, i.is_virtual_shop, i.real_shop_id, sle.is_supported, GROUP_CONCAT(mn.operation_value ORDER BY mn.sort SEPARATOR "·") shopFullName, i.preorder_open_type, i.preorder_closed_support, i.im_switch, i.im_shop_index_switch, i.im_order_not_received_switch, i.im_order_received_switch, i.im_order_not_delivered_switch, i.preorder_open_type, i.im_order_delivered_switch, i.alcohol_license_no FROM shop s LEFT JOIN evaluation e ON s.shop_id = e.shop_id AND e.is_del = 0 LEFT JOIN address a ON a.add_id = s.address_id LEFT JOIN hp_shop_take_self_config t ON s.shop_id = t.shop_id AND t.language_code = 'CN' LEFT JOIN hp_merchant_operation_name mn on s.shop_id = mn.shop_id and mn.is_del = 0 and mn.lang = 'CN' LEFT JOIN shop_extra_info i ON i.shop_id = s.shop_id LEFT JOIN shop_lang_extra sle ON sle.shop_id = s.shop_id AND sle.is_del = 0 AND sle.lang = 'CN' WHERE s.shop_id = 59750820 AND s.is_del = 0 AND s.audit_status = 1 group by s.shop_id LIMIT 1
queryList.58: hp_slave: select product_sku_id,product_sku_name,product_sku_price,is_default,value_name, platform_price,product_id, status ,is_default_spec from product_sku where is_del = 0 and product_sku_id in ( 37288522 , 37288524 , 37288526 )
queryList.59: hp_slave: select a.rec_id, a.shop_id, a.product_id, a.sku_id, a.promote_price, a.promote_type, a.promote_sn, e.limit_purchase_num, hpd.limit_purchase_type, hpd.discount_dimension, e.shop_contribution_rate, c.stock_num, c.lock_num, g.sub_state, hpd.discount_type, hpd.discount_limit, e.discount_value, g.break_type, e.threshold, hpd.is_threshold_limit, hpd.use_channel from hp_product_sku_price as a, hp_product_discount as hpd, hp_sku_promote_stock as c, hp_product_discount_detail as e, `hp_activity_config` as g where a.promote_sn = hpd.discount_sn and a.promote_sn = c.promote_sn and a.sku_id = c.sku_id and a.promote_type = c.promote_type and hpd.status = 1 and hpd.sts = 1 and a.promote_sn = e.discount_sn and a.sku_id = e.sku_id and e.status = 1 and hpd.`activity_sn` = g.`activity_sn` and a.sku_id in ( 37288522 , 37288524 , 37288526 ) AND hpd.promote_type in ( 1 , 4 ) AND hpd.threshold = 0 and hpd.use_channel in (0,1) and a.start_time <= 1748587829 and a.end_time > 1748587829 and a.start_hour <= 14 and a.end_hour > 14 and a.start_week_day <= 5 and a.end_week_day >= 5
